title: Northwind Launches Meridian: Contract Intelligence for Infrastructure Teams
subtitle: The platform connects procurement data, compliance status, and vendor performance into a single audit-ready record
metaDescription: Northwind announces Meridian, a contract intelligence platform for infrastructure and facilities teams managing multi-vendor procurement.
heroImageAlt: Modern office with glass walls and open floor plan

chapters.title: What Meridian does
chapters.bodyHtml:
Meridian ingests contracts from any source — PDFs, DocuSign exports, ERP systems — and produces a normalized record for every obligation: renewal date, spend ceiling, SLA clause, compliance requirement. The record updates automatically when vendors file amendments or regulators publish new requirements in the covered jurisdictions.

We had 340 active vendor contracts across 12 systems. Meridian gave us a single view in four days. The renewal alert alone paid for the first year.

The platform connects to 47 procurement and ERP systems out of the box. Custom connectors are available through the Northwind Partner API, which is publicly documented and carries a 99.9% uptime SLA.

keyPoints.text: Ingests contracts from PDF, DocuSign, and 47 ERP integrations into one normalized record.
Auto-updates obligation records when vendors file amendments or regulations change.
Available June 30 for enterprise accounts; SMB tier follows in Q3 2026.
